name: larky
description: Carry complete Codex turns to Lark and route replies back to the exact paused task.

interface.shortDescription: Continue paused Codex tasks from Lark.
interface.longDescription: Carries the complete turn output through interactive Lark cards when a Codex task stops while your Mac is away, then routes a verified reply to the exact originating task.
defaultPrompt: Use Larky to continue this paused coding task through Lark.
